A gyümölcscentrifugában található szállítócsiga lassan felaprítja a feldolgozott zöldségeket és gyümölcsöket, ezáltal biztosítja a maximális kihasználhatóságot. items.raw_desc: Medence szivattyú CF GROUP Aqua Plus 11 szűrőszivattyú:The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 11 filter pump ensures clean and clear pool water. Suitable for pools up to 50 m³. It is quick and easy to install, the connection is compatible with 32/38 mm flexible hose or 50 mm PVC pipe. The pump offers a flow rate of 11 m³ per hour and has a pre-filter to catch coarser impurities. The transparent pre-filter lid allows to check the filter contamination. The powder-coated motor resists water and chemicals, while the reinforced plastic housing components resist chlorine. The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 11 filter pump is self-priming. It is installed a maximum of 2 m above the water level and 3 m below the water level.
